summary: DC-002: installBrowserApi() hostile pass — no blocking issues found
details: Hostile pass against installBrowserApi() wiring. Attacks: concurrency (none — sync before render), contention (idempotent — no-op if existing), recovery (no resources), input (none). Strongest surviving weakness: lazy-loaded chunks accessing window.api in module scope would bypass polyfill, but this is a general codebase pattern not specific to this change. Repairs: none needed.
